title: Real-Time Web
description: A multiplayer capital-guessing game built with Node.js, Socket.IO and Express. Players compete in real time to identify world capitals — fully server-driven with live leaderboards.

title: bRAIN
description: A sustainability web app connecting IoT rain barrels to civic data. Helps households track water usage and visualise their environmental impact in an accessible, engaging UI.

title: Browser Technologies
description: A progressively enhanced survey form that works beautifully across all devices, browsers and connection speeds — built from the core experience outward, accessibility-first.

title: CSS to the Rescue
description: A zero-JavaScript firework show crafted entirely in HTML & CSS. A deep dive into advanced animation techniques, custom properties and creative constraints.

title: Frontend Development II
description: A mobile-first website built for a zoo, featuring responsive layouts, accessible navigation, fluid typography and smooth scroll interactions — built without frameworks.

title: ISGA City Guide
description: A polished city guide website built to match a client's brand identity — mobile-first, with careful attention to typographic hierarchy and visual consistency.

title: CSS Replication
description: A pixel-perfect recreation of a given visual composition using only HTML & CSS — no images, no JavaScript. An exercise in precise layout thinking and creative CSS.

title: Boomagotchi
description: A virtual tree you can nurture. My first JavaScript project — a playful game exploring DOM manipulation, event-driven programming and stateful UI.

title: Solar System
description: An interactive solar system — my first ever web project. A foundation in semantic HTML, CSS layout and the joy of building something for the browser from scratch.
